## [03:02 - 06:06]

So when we are optimizing our funnels essentially the key to this is to really look at what kind of funnel you have built and you have hopefully followed the framework where you have assigned expected or minimum conversion stats or KPIs to that funnel along each step. So this is kind of a recap of what that might look like, this might change depending on what's acceptable to you and the AOV of the product you're selling but for example here we're wanting a 1% CTR top of funnel, $1 cost per click top of funnel and a max 50% cost per acquisition of the average order value and on and on it goes we have these minimum stats right? And so the first thing to do and this is an example here of a longer sequence funnel, so again you're assigning the stats. So the first thing to do because a lot of you guys would be starting with this minimum viable funnel is that you actually have to map out what is happening. So go in the ad account and pull the average stats right? Am I getting an average 1% CTR top of funnel, $1 cost per click, etc. etc. And you drill down to the actual ad level for each one of those because it could just be that you have one ad that's doing really well but Facebook is feeding all the budget to another ad which means you need to pause the other ad to allow more budget to go to the one that's working. So you basically go overall and you map the stats and then you might identify well top of funnel, no we're not getting the stats we need. Okay, let me drill down into the ad sets. Now let me drill down into the ads and see which one of the ads or which one of those ad sets or is it all of them that's not getting us the stats. Because again it could be that you've got one or two ads in there that are doing really well or one or two ad sets that are doing really well and the rest are just suffering and need to be turned off or they need to be optimized properly. So you go through and you basically pull the stats out and you map out what those stats are generally and then also at the ad level. So you're doing that for the minimum viable funnel and you're doing that as well if you have a longer funnel.
